key_insight: The paper gives a correctness-by-construction DSL for elaboration, so translating implicit surface syntax into explicit core terms becomes a principled equational computation rather than a fragile ad hoc algorithm.
engineering_relevance: This could improve proof assistant front ends by making elaboration more predictable, type-safe, and easier to reason about across systems like Lean, Agda, Idris, and Rocq.
method: Define a dependently typed monadic DSL for executable elaboration specifications.
Shallowly embed a bidirectionally typed Martin-Löf surface language into the DSL.
Extract a concrete elaboration algorithm algebraically from a presheaf model / bi-initial natural model.
evidence_signal: The abstract indicates a theoretical construction and extraction result, but does not report empirical benchmarks or quantitative evaluation.
watch_item: The approach depends on a sophisticated categorical/model-theoretic setup, so practical implementation and performance may be nontrivial.
